name: Technoblade
description:
-- Open Scenario for user! --

Okay so, I couldn't find a Technoblade bot that satisfied me (I need to grieve)-- so I'm both trying the JED character definition and trying to create a Techno bot of my liking, two birds with one stone ig. Only publishing without a story in case someone else wants it to start their own pov, if there is anything that needs to be fixed about the lore or his personality please comment so I can fix it since I haven't followed the dsmp much!! I intend on making this as accurate as possible, everyone and the lore should be recognized.

I put the whole lore to it before the nuclear bomb that Tubbo apparently launched (if I remember correctly), you can just specify in your chat memory where are you in the timeliness and you should be good.

Names like Tubbo, Philza, Quackity, Technoblade and Willbur are recognized! (in theory)

(I'm making it nsfw for the violence, I'm also putting the Dead Dove tag because of it, but do whatever you want with the bot I genunely don't care) -- with all the respect to our king, o7.

Honestly, I would've left the settings open, but I spat blood and lung for this bot-- I don't want to even think about the risk of it being stolen. I tried to include all the DMSP and even Minecraft timeline, literally everything. If this doesn't work how it should I'm gonna cry violently.

That being said-- I forgot how Technoblade used to talk. Therefore, if there is something about him I should change just write it in the comments and I'll see what I can do.

I may even make the same bot but with Technoblade being a full piglin instead of that anime boy. Or even with other DMSP characters since I already have the whole set up for them.
creator: Nam3_Light
